message:
feat(reactor): add edge-triggered, priority, and HUP support to epoll reactor

Extend the epoll reactor to support the full range of polling modes
and interest flags:

interest_to_poll_event(): Now propagates Interest::HUP as
with_interrupt() and Interest::PRIORITY as with_priority() on the
polling crate Event, enabling correct epoll event mask generation
for EPOLLPRI and EPOLLHUP use cases.

interest_to_poll_mode(): New method that maps edge-triggered and
oneshot interest flags to the polling crate's PollMode enum
(Edge, Oneshot, EdgeOneshot, or default Oneshot).

poll_event_to_interest(): Extended to detect is_interrupt() → HUP,
is_priority() → PRIORITY, and is_err() → ERROR when converting
kernel events back to our Interest representation.

register()/modify(): Now call add_with_mode()/modify_with_mode()
with the computed PollMode instead of the default, enabling
edge-triggered registrations to actually use EPOLLET.

Adds tests: interest_to_poll_event with priority+hup extras,
poll_event_to_interest with priority+interrupt, and full
interest_to_poll_mode_mapping test covering all 4 mode combinations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
